{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Scylon system
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The ship is currently located in the [[Scylon system]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
